title: Resolution Adopting Administrative Order No. 30, Series of 2020 on the Interruption of Periods for Filing and Submission of Documents, Cancellation of Proceedings, Suspension of Deadlines for Payment of Taxes, Fees and Other Charges, and on the Movement of Timelines for the Grant and Release of Benefits. (AUTHOR: COUNCILOR JANOS S. LAPIZ, 06/01/2020)
